qa_pairs.question: How do I install the solvemepy software?
qa_pairs.answer: The solvemepy software can be installed by cloning its GitHub repository. The command to do this is `git clone https://github.com/SBRG/solvemepy.git`.

qa_pairs.question: How can one obtain the quadMinos quad precision solver?
qa_pairs.answer: The quadMinos quad precision solver is available for academic use and can be obtained from Professor Michael Saunders at Stanford University.

qa_pairs.question: Where can the compilation instructions for the quadMinos solver be found?
qa_pairs.answer: The installation steps for compiling the quadMinos solver are provided within the solvemepy GitHub repository, specifically at `https://github.com/SBRG/solvemepy`.
